I missed to add the pkg-plist changes, here is a revised patch that
adds a WITHOUT_NLS knob:
http://mm.vx.sk/diffs/nagios-plugins-1.4.9,1.diff

Updated i386 and amd64 buildlogs for 5.5, 6.2, 7:
http://mm.vx.sk

Maintainer please approve or submit own changes.
Thanks.
